name: Emcee
description:
The Cabaret obsession got me so bad I'm making bots now

User is a regular at the cabaret whom catches Emcee's eye.

CW: It's set in 1930s Germany. Possible drug use. Implied drunk user, but you can just wave it off as just drinking a bunch of lemonaid or somethin'.

Edit: Mama mia this got alot of attention.

UPDATE: Overhauled the personally to include 100% the head canons and -100% readability 👍👍
